news.title: Iran rejects U.S. ceasefire offer, demands sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz
news.title_cn: 伊朗拒絕美國停火提議，要求對霍爾木茲海峽擁有主權

news.title: Jury in Los Angeles finds Meta, YouTube negligent in social media addiction trial
news.title_cn: 洛杉磯陪審團發現 Meta 和 YouTube 在社群媒體成癮審判中存在疏忽

news.title: White House says Trump will meet Xi in China in May
news.title_cn: 白宮稱川普將於五月在中國會見習近平

news.title: Dow jumps 300 points as oil falls after U.S. reportedly sends Iran peace plan: Live updates
news.title_cn: 據報道，美國向伊朗發出和平計畫後，油價下跌，道瓊指數上漲 300 點：即時更新

news.title: Republicans balk at Senate Democrats' DHS shutdown counteroffer
news.title_cn: 共和黨人對參議院民主黨人提出的國土安全部關閉還價猶豫不決

news.title: These dividend stocks are higher since the Iran war began. Wall Street believes they have more room to run
news.title_cn: 自伊朗戰爭開始以來，這些股息較高。華爾街認為他們還有更大的運作空間

news.title: My PayPal account received money from the Philippines with two phone numbers listed. I called them. Big mistake.
news.title_cn: 我的 PayPal 帳戶收到了來自菲律賓的資金，並列出了兩個電話號碼。我打電話給他們。大錯誤。

news.title: I have $1,000 in credit-card debt. Is it OK to save for a house instead of paying it off?
news.title_cn: 我有 1,000 美元的信用卡債務。存錢買房子而不是還清貸款可以嗎？
